meta.poznamky: Seřaď 8 top-level bloků: repeat4{f100,r90} + penUp + r90 + f20 + l90 + f20 + penDown + repeat4{f60,r90}. Vnější čtverec 100px od (110,110), vnitřní 60px od (130,130). Repositioning: otoč dolů, jdi 20, otoč vpravo, jdi 20.

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]dva soustředné čtverce — velký a malý jeden uvnitř druhého[/hlp]. Použijte pero k přesunu na správnou startovní pozici.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1" x="20" y="20"></block><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="300" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2" x="20" y="180"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2" x="300" y="200"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_left" id="lt1" x="20" y="340"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3" x="300" y="360"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1" x="20" y="480"></block><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2" x="300" y="480"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn2"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f4"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg3"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1"><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="lt1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn2"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f4"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg3"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
